title: QUIC RFC 9000 Reordering And Gap Immediate ACK Scheduling Work Item
summary: Add direct requirement-home proof and focused trace links for immediate ACK scheduling on reordered or gap-detecting ack-eliciting packets.
planned_changes:
- Add positive tests for both lower-packet and higher-gap ack-eliciting immediate-ACK branches.
- Add negative and edge tests for contiguous ack-eliciting packets and non-ack-eliciting gaps.
- Add deterministic fuzz/property coverage for reordered, duplicate, contiguous, and gapped second-packet observations.
- Link the RFC 9000 Section 13.2.1 reordering/gap immediate-ACK requirement to a focused architecture, work-item, and verification artifact set while preserving the broad RFC9000-0001 trace.
- Preserve focused verification evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-reordering-gap-immediate-ack/`.
verification_plan: Run the focused RFC 9000 reordering/gap immediate-ACK requirement-home tests, render/check the touched SpecTrace artifacts, verify reciprocal trace links for the focused artifact set, run `git diff --check`, and preserve evidence under `artifacts/verification/20260425-rfc9000-reordering-gap-immediate-ack/`.
completion_notes: Completed as a direct requirement-home proof over existing ACK-generation state; no production behavior changed.
